texto: Being a feminist in principle is easy compared to being a feminist in practice. For men and women, living each day in practical defiance of thousands of years of gender-based streaming is so much harder than walking in marches, running workshops, and writing blog posts. It means questioning everything you do, moment by moment, day by day. It means thinking differently and making dozens of conscious decisions every day that you might have made on auto-pilot before. It's hard. It's taxing. It's tiring.
explicacao: Citação de Terry Fallis sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Being a feminist in principle is easy compared to being a feminist in practice. For men and women…” articula reflexao, activism, feminism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.

frase_original: Being a feminist in principle is easy compared to being a feminist in practice. For men and women, living each day in practical defiance of thousands of years of gender-based streaming is so much harder than walking in marches, running workshops, and writing blog posts. It means questioning everything you do, moment by moment, day by day. It means thinking differently and making dozens of conscious decisions every day that you might have made on auto-pilot before. It's hard. It's taxing. It's tiring.

texto: I truly believed that a man should not be seen to be out front on feminism. That would be just like a man to try to take over the women's movement. We'd taken over everything else in history, in society, in the world, why not feminism, too? No, I don't think so.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Terry Fallis: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I truly believed that a man should not be seen to be out front on feminism. That would be just li…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, feminism, humour pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humour.
